title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to `target`. You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice.
inputFormat:
First line: space-separated integers
Second line: target integer

title: Reverse a String
description: Given a string `s`, return the string reversed.
inputFormat: A single string

title: FizzBuzz
description: Given an integer `n`, for each integer `i` in [1,n]: print FizzBuzz if divisible by both 3 and 5, Fizz if by 3, Buzz if by 5, else print i.
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Palindrome Check
description: Given a string `s`, return `true` if it is a palindrome after converting to lowercase and removing non-alphanumeric characters, `false` otherwise.
inputFormat: A single line containing a string

sampleTestCases.input: A man a plan a canal Panama

hiddenTestCases.input: Was it a car or a cat I saw

title: Find Maximum Element
description: Given an array of integers, find and return the maximum element.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers
outputFormat: A single integer — the maximum value

title: Count Vowels
description: Given a string `s`, count and return the total number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) considering both uppercase and lowercase.
inputFormat: A single string s

title: Factorial
description: Given a non-negative integer `n`, return the factorial of n. 0! = 1.
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Sum of Array
description: Given an array of integers, return the sum of all elements.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Check Even or Odd
description: Given an integer `n`, print 'Even' if even, 'Odd' otherwise.
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Fibonacci Number
description: Given an integer `n`, return the nth Fibonacci number. F(0)=0, F(1)=1, F(n)=F(n-1)+F(n-2).
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Prime Number Check
description: Given an integer `n`, return `true` if prime, `false` otherwise.
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: GCD of Two Numbers
description: Given two non-negative integers `a` and `b`, return their GCD.
inputFormat: Two space-separated integers a and b

title: Reverse a Number
description: Given a 32-bit signed integer `x`, return x with its digits reversed. Return 0 on overflow.
inputFormat: A single integer x

title: Missing Number
description: Given an array containing n distinct numbers in range [0,n], return the missing number.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Armstrong Number
description: Check if a number is an Armstrong number (sum of digits raised to power of digit count equals the number).
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Binary Search
description: Given a sorted array and a target, return its index using Binary Search, or -1 if not found.
constraints:
1 <= nums.length <= 10^4
nums sorted ascending
-10^4 <= nums[i], target <= 10^4
inputFormat:
First line: n and target
Second line: n sorted integers

title: Anagram Check
description: Given two strings s and t, return true if t is an anagram of s.
inputFormat: Two strings on separate lines

title: Power of Two
description: Given an integer `n`, return true if it is a power of two.
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Count Digits
description: Given a positive integer `n`, return the number of digits.
inputFormat: A single positive integer n

title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
description: Given two sorted arrays, merge them into one sorted array.
inputFormat:
First line: m then m sorted integers
Second line: n then n sorted integers

title: Second Largest Element
description: Find the second largest element in array. Return -1 if it doesn't exist.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Linear Search
description: Given an array and target, return index of target or -1 if not found.
inputFormat:
First line: n and target
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Bubble Sort
description: Sort array using Bubble Sort algorithm.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
description: Given a sorted array, remove duplicates in-place and return new length.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n sorted integers

title: Count Occurrences
description: Count how many times target appears in the array.
inputFormat:
First line: n and target
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Maximum Subarray (Kadane's Algorithm)
description: Given an integer array, find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum and return its sum.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given a string of brackets, determine if it is valid.
inputFormat: A string of bracket characters

title: Longest Common Prefix
description: Find the longest common prefix string amongst an array of strings.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Next n lines: one string per line
outputFormat: Longest common prefix or empty string

title: Climbing Stairs
description: You can climb 1 or 2 steps. How many distinct ways to reach the top of n stairs?
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Product of Array Except Self
description: Return array where each element is product of all others. No division allowed.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
inputFormat: A single string s

title: 3Sum
description: Return all unique triplets that sum to zero.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers
outputFormat: Each triplet sorted on separate line. NONE if no triplets.

title: Coin Change
description: Return fewest coins needed to make amount. Return -1 if impossible.
inputFormat:
First line: n and amount
Second line: n coin denominations

title: Rotate Array
description: Rotate array to right by k steps.
inputFormat:
First line: n and k
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Find All Duplicates
description: Return all integers that appear twice in array where values are in [1,n].
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers
outputFormat: Duplicates sorted ascending space-separated. NONE if none.

title: Subarray Sum Equals K
description: Return total number of continuous subarrays whose sum equals k.
inputFormat:
First line: n and k
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Return k most frequent elements in ascending order.
inputFormat:
First line: n and k
Second line: n space-separated integers
outputFormat: k most frequent elements ascending order

title: Merge Intervals
description: Merge all overlapping intervals.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Next n lines: start end

title: Count Primes
description: Return count of prime numbers strictly less than n.
inputFormat: A single integer n
outputFormat: Count of primes less than n

title: Spiral Matrix
description: Return all elements of matrix in spiral order.
inputFormat:
First line: m and n
Next m lines: n integers

title: House Robber
description: Max amount you can rob without robbing adjacent houses.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Minimum Path Sum
description: Find path from top-left to bottom-right with minimum sum (move right or down only).
inputFormat:
First line: m and n
Next m lines: n integers

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Search target in rotated sorted array. Return index or -1.
inputFormat:
First line: n and target
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Generate Parentheses
description: Generate all valid combinations of n pairs of parentheses.
inputFormat: A single integer n
outputFormat: All valid combinations one per line in lexicographic order

title: Decode Ways
description: Return number of ways to decode a digit string using A=1...Z=26.
inputFormat: A string of digits

title: Number of Islands
description: Count number of islands in binary grid (1=land, 0=water).
inputFormat:
First line: m and n
Next m lines: n space-separated 0s and 1s

title: Binary Tree Inorder Traversal
description: Return inorder traversal of binary tree given as level-order array (-1 for null).
inputFormat: Level-order array space-separated (-1 for null)

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Return length of longest strictly increasing subsequence.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Unique Paths
description: Count unique paths from top-left to bottom-right in m x n grid (only right/down moves).
inputFormat: Two integers m and n

title: Maximum Product Subarray
description: Find contiguous subarray with largest product.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Jump Game
description: Can you reach the last index? Each element is max jump length.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Container With Most Water
description: Find two lines that form container holding most water.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Letter Combinations of Phone Number
description: Return all possible letter combinations a digit string could represent.
inputFormat: A string of digits
outputFormat: All combinations space-separated lexicographically. NONE if empty.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Compute how much water can be trapped after raining given elevation map.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Return the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(m+n)).
inputFormat:
First line: m then m sorted integers
Second line: n then n sorted integers

title: N-Queens Problem
description: Return number of distinct solutions to place n queens on n x n board.
inputFormat: A single integer n

title: Longest Valid Parentheses
description: Return length of longest valid parentheses substring.
inputFormat: A string of parentheses

title: Wildcard Matching
description: Implement wildcard matching with '?' (any single char) and '*' (any sequence).
inputFormat:
First line: string s
Second line: pattern p

title: Word Search
description: Check if word exists in grid by traversing adjacent cells.
inputFormat:
First line: m and n
Next m lines: n chars
Last line: word

title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description: Serialize and deserialize binary tree. Return inorder traversal to verify.
inputFormat: Level-order array space-separated (-1 for null)

title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
description: Return area of largest rectangle in histogram.
inputFormat:
First line: n
Second line: n space-separated integers

title: Regular Expression Matching
description: Implement regex matching with '.' (any char) and '*' (zero or more of preceding).
inputFormat:
First line: string s
Second line: pattern p

sampleTestCases.explanation: a* matches zero or more a's

title: Edit Distance
description: Return minimum operations (insert, delete, replace) to convert word1 to word2.
inputFormat:
First line: word1
Second line: word2

title: Sudoku Solver
description: Solve Sudoku puzzle. 0 represents empty cells.
inputFormat: 9 lines of 9 space-separated integers (0 for empty)
